entities.name: FRONTIER TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Advanced scientific tools and techniques used to enhance crop breeding and development

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops to improve yield, quality, or resilience

entities.name: GERMPLASM CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying and describing the genetic and phenotypic characteristics of genebank accessions

entities.name: GENEBANK ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Samples of genetic material stored in a gene bank for conservation and breeding

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT SEQUENCING
entities.description: Techniques that allow for the rapid sequencing of large amounts of DNA

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: A breeding technique to accelerate the time taken to reach homozygous lines

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the genomic location of a specific trait

entities.name: GENE DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying new genes associated with specific traits

entities.name: HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: A group of alleles in an organism that are inherited together from a single parent

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A form of marker-assisted selection that uses genome-wide markers to predict breeding values

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: A type of genetic engineering in which DNA is inserted, deleted, modified or replaced in the genome of a living organism

entities.name: FORWARD BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that moves from phenotype to genotype

entities.name: MULTI-OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: The integration of multiple omics data types, such as genomics, transcriptomics, and proteomics

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS TOOLS
entities.description: Software and computational tools used to analyze biological data

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring the physical and biochemical traits of an organism

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties that have been produced in cultivation by selective breeding

entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants grown for food, fiber, or other economic purposes
